title: Partly out of range part-select gives wrong runtime result

features.name: part-select write with variable index exceeding vector bounds
features.description: Code should include a part-select assignment using variable-index syntax [start -: width] where the selected bit range partially exceeds the vector bounds

features.name: multiple sequential part-select assignments with boundary case
features.description: Code should include sequential part-select assignments where the last assignment uses a start index that causes partial out-of-range access on a packed vector
